items.title: The Line of Love, by James Branch Cabell
items.content: <article>A generational saga plays out in a series of short stories about love and marriage in medieval Europe.</article>

items.title: The Fire in the Flint, by Walter White
items.content: <article>An optimistic Black physician returns to his Georgia hometown where he must grapple with racial tensions he thought had faded.</article>

items.title: Poetry, by Maria Lowell
items.content: <article>A collection of poetry by abolitionist Maria Lowell, published posthumously.</article>

items.title: Craig Kennedy Stories, by Arthur B. Reeve
items.content: <article>A collection of short stories starring Craig Kennedy, scientific detective.</article>

items.title: Pirates of Venus, by Edgar Rice Burroughs
items.content: <article>A space traveler accidentally finds himself on Venus and must learn the local customs to survive.</article>

items.title: The Mystery of Edwin Drood, by Charles Dickens
items.content: <article>A young man mysteriously vanishes, and all the suspects are secretly in love with his fiancé.</article>

items.title: Memoirs of an Infantry Officer, by Siegfried Sassoon
items.content: <article>An Englishman recounts his service, and his turn to pacifism, during World War I.</article>

items.title: The Perfume of Eros, by Edgar Saltus
items.content: <article>Two intertwined love triangles are thrown into turmoil when a body is found on a bench in Gramercy Park, New York.</article>

items.title: Flight, by Walter White
items.content: <article>A young Louisiana Creole woman struggles for racial and gender equality as she asserts her independence.</article>

items.title: Deadlock, by Dorothy M. Richardson
items.content: <article>An independent woman living in a London boarding house at the dawn of the twentieth century becomes involved with a fellow lodger from Russia.</article>

items.title: Basil, by Wilkie Collins
items.content: <article>An aristocratic young man falls in love at first sight with a lower-class girl on an omnibus, with disastrous consequences.</article>

items.title: Short Science Fiction, by Noel Loomis
items.content: <article>A collection of short science fiction stories by Noel Loomis.</article>
